attr.title: Even the Ocean
attr.desc: Even the Ocean is a 2D action-platformer following Aliph, a power plant technician, through a world where Light and Dark energy shape everything. Explore diverse environments, solve platforming challenges, and uncover a story about duty, nature, and the forces that connect us.
attr.inst: Copy the full 'gamedata' folder from your GOG or Steam Linux installation of Even the Ocean into the port directory (ports/eventheocean/).
